## Summary

Describe the change and why it was made.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor

## Testing

- [ ] `composer test`
- [ ] `composer run ci`
- [ ] Other:

## Checklist

- [ ] I have updated tests for this change, or explained why no test update was needed.
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed.
- [ ] I have kept the change backward compatible, or documented the breaking change.
- [ ] I have verified the code passes relevant checks locally.

## Notes

Add any additional context, screenshots, or compatibility notes here.
